EA1-D-01.reference_pattern: GOV.UK Design System bulk mark-as-read action
EA1-D-01.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a bulk-update feature absent a bulk backend endpoint.
required_boundary: Keep the existing one-at-a-time mark-as-read action working as-is

EA1-D-02.reference_pattern: Fluent UI thirty-second auto-refresh status pattern
EA1-D-02.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize an auto-refresh interval or polling policy.
required_boundary: Keep the existing manual-refresh behavior working as-is

EA1-D-03.reference_pattern: Lightning Design System visually distinct primary/secondary buttons
EA1-D-03.forbidden_inference: A static reference image cannot establish that the visual distinction is also conveyed to screen-reader users.
required_boundary: Keep the existing Cancel/Confirm buttons working as-is until non-visual labeling is verified

protected_concerns.summary: Non-visual differentiation of the two actions is unresolved and must not be asserted from a screenshot.

EA1-D-04.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize sorting, filtering, or comparison controls for a three-row list with no comparison task.
required_boundary: Keep the existing plain three-row list working as-is

EA1-D-05.reference_pattern: Carbon Design System inline retry-and-status row
EA1-D-05.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a dunning schedule or an external collections surface.
required_boundary: Show pending, succeeded, or failed state

protected_concerns.summary: A retried payment must not lose the original invoice identity or claim success before completion.

EA1-D-06.forbidden_inference: The reference cannot authorize a new autosave or navigation-blocking behavior beyond showing the existing dirty flag.
required_boundary: Reflect the existing in-memory dirty flag
